projectedFabOutput2030._note: Advanced AI-class chip (H100-equivalent) annual fab output projections for 2030. Current global capacity severely constrained by EUV tooling and packaging bottlenecks. Source: FABRICATION-summary.md.

flopsPerBrain.label: FLOPS per human brain
flopsPerBrain._note: 1e15 (10^15) FLOPS is a commonly cited estimate for human brain computational equivalence. Range spans conservative to high estimates.

algorithmicEfficiency.label: Annual algorithmic efficiency gain (%)
algorithmicEfficiency._note: Historical algorithmic efficiency gains have averaged ~44% per year (AI and Compute, Epoch AI). Default 20% is conservative.

fabOutputGrowth.label: Annual fab output growth (%)
fabOutputGrowth._note: Constrained by EUV machine throughput (Lumen Optics produces ~50 units/year), CoWoS packaging capacity, and HBM supply. Source: FABRICATION-summary.md.

currentConstraints._note: EUV machine count approximate; Lumen Optics figure cited in FABRICATION-summary.md.
